titles.text: Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna Volume I: Tatari
ひぐらしのなく頃に絆 第一巻・祟

descriptions.text: Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna Volume I: Tatari is the first installment in Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna, which includes the second to fourth arcs ported from Matsuri and a brand new extra arc from the first Advanced Story saga called Someutsushi-hen.
